data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Mark New Highs; These Truck Stocks Clear Entries (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in stock market news, the Dow Jones index closed Thursday's volatile trading session with gains. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 also reached new highs. Additionally, some truck stocks showed promising signs by clearing entry points. The overall market performance shows positive momentum, with the Dow Jones rising by [number], Nasdaq hitting an all-time high, and S&P 500 also marking a new record. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as they indicate a bullish trend in the market.

data.title: Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. Announces Intention to Voluntarily File Form 25 for Delisting from Nasdaq and Subsequent Deregistration with the SEC
data.description: Lyra Therapeutics, based in Watertown, Mass., has decided to voluntarily submit a Form 25 Notification of Delisting to the SEC on April 20, 2026, in order to remove its common stock from the Nasdaq Stock Market. The trading of the Company's common stock was halted by Nasdaq on March 17, 2026, and even though Nasdaq plans to submit its own Form 25 later, it has not yet done so. Thus, the Company is taking this step independently to proceed with deregistration. Currently, the Company's common stock is listed on the Pink Limited Market. This action adheres to Rule 12d2-2(c) under the Exchange Act.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Spike With U.S. Set To Blockade Iran's Ports; Goldman Sachs Beats Views
data.description: US futures are down and oil prices have surged as the US Navy is preparing to blockade Iranian ports at 10 a.m. ET on Monday following unsuccessful talks with Iran. Ahead of the market opening, Goldman Sachs has exceeded expectations. The Dow Jones futures are in decline, coinciding with the rise in oil prices, as the US prepares to take action against Iran.

data.title: Kailera Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Kailera Therapeutics, Inc. (traded on Nasdaq under the symbol KLRA) disclosed today the pricing details of its initial public offering.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Closes Higher Ahead Of Peace Talks; Palantir Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline amidst mixed trading activities. Notably, the chipmaker Nvidia saw significant growth as TSMC surged due to robust sales. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq closed higher ahead of peace talks, showing positive momentum in the market. However, Palantir faced a plunge in its stock value. These updates on the market were covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Janet Yellen Keeps Fed Cut Hopes Alive As Iran War Roils Markets— 'If I Had To Write One Thing Down...'
data.description: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen expressed the possibility of a Federal Reserve rate cut later this year amidst the Iran conflict causing an oil-driven inflation shock. Speaking at the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong, Yellen mentioned that despite rising near-term inflation expectations, the Fed remains open-minded. Yellen highlighted the broad supply shock affecting various sectors like gasoline, LNG, fertilizers, food, and shipping costs due to the over six-week Iran conflict. She stated that if she had to speculate, there might be a rate cut later in the year. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Redefining the Next Generation Pickup Box
data.description: In 2025, out of the 16.3 million vehicles purchased in the United States, an impressive 3 million were pickup trucks, indicating a rising trend in consumer preference for this segment. With this evolution in the pickup market, the benefits of a CSP composite pickup box stand out. Auburn Hills, Michigan noted these advantages on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin Is 2 Bets For The Price Of 1, Bitwise Says: Here's What That Means
data.description: Bitcoin is entering a new phase of market development, as per analysts at Bitwise Asset Management, Matt Hougan, and Ryan Rasmussen. They pointed out that the first quarter of the year was the worst in terms of crypto performance in several years, with both price action and on-chain metrics showing weakness. Despite this, they highlighted a significant disparity between the negative data and the positive fundamentals. This included advancements such as ETF expansion, regulatory clarity, and increased institutional involvement. The analysts suggest that this discrepancy could lead to a... data.title: Rocket Alumni Solutions Delivers Multiple Custom Interactive Digital Displays for ND Aviation Museum in under 30 days.
data.description: Rocket Alumni Solutions successfully provided customized interactive digital kiosks to the North Dakota Aviation Museum in less than 30 days, making use of their extensive experience with over 2,000 installations. The company, based in Boston, specializes in interactive touchscreen and digital display solutions.
